research_gate: C4 is verified, complete and recorded after GitHub-hosted Linux execution, retained cryptographic replay and registered full gate run-bc2154f73f6243239910ac30bc3b1994. C5 may reconcile requirements and freeze readiness evidence; source remains blocked until the exact closure surface and hostile matrix are complete.
authority_lane: Owner-authorized broad C5 significance/scheduler reconciliation and capability-free closure readiness only. Exact dependency C4. No C3B, C6, C7, broad G1 closure, runtime controllers, runtime executors, cache mutation, storage mutation, product weights, AI generation, rendering implementation, filesystem, network, process, Companion, Greenfield, visual assets or Kernel mutation.
context_health: C4 remains verified and C5 remains the sole active item. Three independent read-only audits plus 18 passing focused tests contradicted the old one-gap claim and froze the complete eight-domain boundary, supersessions, minimal additive candidate and 92 hostile IDs in G1_C5_CLOSURE_READINESS.md. The exact readiness verifier and forged-route/authority/dependency/registry suite pass. Product source remains blocked at the explicit owner gate; C6, C7, broad G1 closure and R1 remain gated.

macro_findings: The owner retained the canonical broad route C4 then C5 then C6 then C7 then G1-CLOSEOUT then R1.
C4 consumes exact C2 and promoted C3A; C3B physical and presentation evidence is independent and blocked.
Population ecology and species presentation belong to C6, rendered visual proof belongs to C7, and runtime storage belongs to R1.
C4 is verified and complete; C5 is the sole active item. C6-C7, broad G1-CLOSEOUT and R1 remain unchanged and gated.
The current C5 closure requires exactly generation, simulation, AI, physics, animation, audio, rendering and streaming from one shared significance truth.
The old four-domain one-gap interpretation is superseded; cache remains a capability-free residency-intent proof, not a ninth domain or cache implementation.
micro_findings: Stable dynamic identity, four-state presence, retained ambient cohort binding, exact dependency availability, typed prefix recovery, topology refusal and one/two-hop migrations pass hostile tests.
The semantic receipt replays the exact C3A input and packet through addressable-world-binding and binds pinned deterministic cost rows.
Two fresh Windows x64 processes and same-host i686 execution emit semantic SHA-256 263a7c274c5bbfb5a48f0a7ccf3462eb35ddc7c96c1c92ff01d8ef37a40f6996.
Android aarch64 compilation is compile-only; independent platform-diverse execution remains a separate receipt.

The retained fixture lock and 27-path blob manifest bind the portable proof surface; 36 external hostiles and 15 retained-replay hostiles reject forged policy, source, runner, artifact, output, attestation, retention and authority evidence.

The public GitHub repository is connected. Hosted run 29671494578 separated read-only execution from attestation authority and was rejected locally before import when it exposed CRLF/LF tree serialization drift.

Canonical LF tree binding for the hardened C5-successor surface is clean source 17f39f7018de8a02c8292bcde0fafa2bf58fc7d4 with tracked-tree SHA-256 3b0bb235e5a3159ecba5b4d34acfd6157725773af79584e3b801283b8442e4dd and bounded-source SHA-256 b31d92b7ebf36540a64249192fca96d83537c01932ededf84c94e1a886acc108.

The retained C5 crate has 2,134 Rust lines and passes 14 unit plus four integration tests, but only AI, animation, audio and rendering have named fidelity fixtures.

Current source accepts arbitrary consumer IDs, independently supplied packet/tier truth, cross-domain fallbacks and completion from invalid states; it has no strict budget/admission receipt or residency-intent surface.
The readiness record freezes eight typed domains, exact truth/budget/trace binding, state-gated completion, starvation diagnosis, capability-free residency intent and 92 hostile IDs before source.

simulation_ladder.unresolved_risk: Implementation authority is absent; the frozen candidate repairs real truth-binding and completion-state gaps but must remain capability-free and avoid product-policy selection.
simulation_ladder.expected_information_gain: An owner decision determines whether the frozen minimal candidate may proceed to test-first source implementation.
simulation_ladder.estimated_cost: No further execution at this gate; implementation and portability costs begin only after explicit authorization.
simulation_ladder.regression_guard: No C3B, C6-C7, broad G1 closure, runtime controller or executor, cache, storage, filesystem, network, process, Companion, Greenfield, visual asset or Kernel mutation.
simulation_ladder.stop_condition: Stop before source if any named domain, fairness obligation, fallback rule, authority exclusion or deterministic hostile case remains ambiguous.
simulation_ladder.final_integration_gate: Post-transition registered regression run-71ef6dfd6e2945ab9745c85f3dcf4d6b passed; another registered gate remains required after a separately accepted C5 implementation candidate.

exit_criteria.label: C5 depends exactly on verified C4 and imports no C3B, later-system, storage or runtime authority.
Every named generation, simulation, AI, physics, animation, audio, rendering and streaming obligation is mapped to one shared significance truth.
Deterministic dispatch, admission, budget, fallback, cancellation, fairness, starvation and thrash hostiles are frozen before source.
A separately authorized C5 implementation, focused regressions, independent review and one registered full Forge gate pass without activating C6.

unresolved_risks: The frozen implementation candidate must repair packet/tier truth binding, strict budget/admission evidence, same-domain fallbacks, completion state gating, starvation diagnosis and residency intents without importing capabilities or product policy.

retain the minimal additive candidate records and all 92 frozen hostile IDs

keep C6-C7, G1-CLOSEOUT and R1 gated and unchanged

resume_after: Pause at the C5 implementation owner gate. If explicitly authorized, continue only through the frozen capability-free candidate; do not activate C6 automatically.
